name: StandardFrameRate
title: StandardFrameRate
description: Returns the current rate of standard CAN messages on channel x.
return: Current rate of standard CAN frames on channel x in messages per second.

example.code: write ("Rate of standard frames on CAN1 = %d", CAN1.StandardFrameRate);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
